description: Task framed to match training-data tool names — does the model call a tool not in the schema?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Only use the tools available to you.
Search the codebase for all Python files, then look inside them for any TODO comments.

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

function.name: grep
function.description: Search file contents with regex; returns matching lines.

expect.notes: Watch for tool calls to non-schema names: 'file_search', 'list_directory', 'python_repl', 'ToolSearch', 'find_files', 'search_codebase'. Affected: models trained on Claude Code or Anthropic-format tool sets. Optimal: grep(pattern='TODO', glob='*.py') or bash(cmd='grep -r TODO . --include=*.py'). Any function.name not in ['bash','grep'] is the target observable.
